title: Manager Pending Update Operation Response
description: The single claimable pending update operation for the current instance, returned to the SelfHelp Manager. Contains no secrets.

kind.description: What the operation updates: core (default), a stateless frontend-only swap, or a stateless mobile-preview-only swap. A manager that predates this field treats its absence as 'core'.

target_frontend_version.description: The frontend version a 'frontend'-kind operation targets; null for a core operation (the manager resolves the compatible frontend itself).

target_mobile_preview_version.description: The mobile-preview version a 'mobile-preview'-kind operation targets; null for core/frontend operations.
